sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82704" key="pessopoie/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεσσο-ποιέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n82704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make and apply a</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πεσσός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to oneself</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg001.perseus-grc1:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">103</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
